Notice Of Motion To Enter Judgment Under Terms
Of Stipulated Settlement
Off Calendar Mar-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S Motion To Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement.

No Appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank's motion to enter judgment under terms of stipulated settlement is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The court will sign the previously submitted proposed order and proposed judgment.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/HK)
